choices: Suddenly a giant anthro show's up
1.content:
As the water Wash over your body, Tyler wake's up on the beach shore. He couphed and spat out salt water, he shakes his head to get the sand out of his eyes, he crawled up the Sandy Beach and stood up.

Dazed and confused he looks down at himself still wearing your red t-shirt and tan cargo pants but lost your shoes you were completely barefoot. He suddenly felt a sharp pain on his head, he placed his hand on his head and down there was little blood on it.

You most have hit your head pretty hard, all you could remember is that you was sailing in the middle of the ocean and there was this storm. The waves ware so strong it twist and turned over the boat banged your head in the process.

So you decided tear a piece of your shirt and tie it around your head and over the wound to stop the bleeding.

After You done that, looked around to see where you are, it was quite clear he was on some kind of island in the middle of the Pacific ocean. in front of you there was a thick tropical Forest, You thought to yourself on rather you should explore the island's forest or stay on the beach. With a little time thinking you decided to?
1.title: The beginning

11.content:
With little thinking, You decided to explore the Forest.

You started hiking into the forest, the Forest itself was pretty thick the site was beautiful, There were palm trees, palm fronds, small river's.

As You hiked deeper into the vest forest, in about an hour or so you came across?
11.title: Explore the forest

111.content:
As Tyler continued hiking through the forest, he saw a light at the end of the forest. Tyler new it was the exit out of the forest, so he ran out towards light and exited the forest and into a wide open field.

You was relieved when you finally got out of forest, but the relief was short lived as you looked out into the opened field, your eyes went wide in shock as he saw a crowd various anthro's GIANT ones.

You couldn’t believe your eyes, there were at least 30 to 40 of them you counted but you weren't exactly sure just how many were on this island, you wondered just how big this island was to house such giant beings.

They were all Anthropomorphic or humanoid in Appearance and hundreds of feet tall, they seemed to come from various species.

They all seemed to be normally socializing with each other, like talking, walking from all directions, some were hanging out in the lake like some public pool and some were just by themselves watching others. Just like being in a park just daily activities.

You were absolutely terrified and thought about running back into the forest, but you were also amazed by the site of these large beings.

You thought about getting a closer look of these great giants but that would be risk of being spotted or worse.

You decided to?
111.title: A open field

1113.content:
Out of amazement and curiosity Tyler wanted to get a closer look at these amazing giant's.

As you looked around the field to see if there was a way to get closer to the giant anthro's without being seen, he spotted a few patches of trees, bushes, shrubs, scattered around the field.

You saw a pile of bushes down a steep Hill you slide down the hill and into the bushes and took cover, you poke your head up and saw another pile bushes a couple feet away.

You jump out of the bushes and ran into the next pile of bushes and the same to the next, as you got closer to these giant being's you can actually hear them chatter and feel the ground shake as there feet make loud crashing thud's as they walked.

You make a final run towards rather small pile of bushes that was sitting a few feet away from a lake in witch a few giant anthro's were bathing in.

As you take cover in the small bushes, you peak out and observe these giant amazing creatures.

The first one you spot looks like a male green pterodactyl, his body looked kinda weak to the point that you can actually see his rib cage a little, but you see he dose some muscle on him.

He looked kinda sad and lonely, maybe a desperate need of a friend.

He looked to be around 200 feet tall.

You looked around and saw two female anthro's, one a lioness the other a tigeress
Both were 100 feet tall.

Then you saw three male anthro's, one a grey wolf his body athletic, the second was a blue jay do to the blue and white coloring of his fur or feather's his body was athletic but slimmer then the wolf, the third was a grizzly bear his body fat but looks to be mixed muscle.

You looked Around and saw other giant anthro's some of them you recognize frome you're favorite video game "like the "Nargacuga" and the "Barioth" from "Monster Hunter".

You dive back down into the bushes, the site of these giant creatures were fascinating, suddenly the ground started to shake and hear loud rumbling footsteps.

You peak out of the bushes and saw a giant anthro was heading towards your direction.

The giant anthro was?
1113.title: Getting a closer look

11133.content: The monster's from monster Hunter?
11133.title: Other

choices: Stay and observe the other anthro's
Nargacuga heard you scream and spotted you
111331.content:
As you peaked out of the bushes and saw that a giant anthro was walking towards your diraction, as the giant anthro was getting closer you started to recognize it.

It was definitely a male as you can see his package dangling between his legs. His body shape looked a little underweight but still have some muscle on him, his body fur is dark blue but his underbelly was white, dark grey-ish scale's on his arms and feet.

He kinda looks like a panther, he has yellow cat eyes, and pointy ear's that looked kinda bat like.

But the most noticeable thing about this anthro was the fact that he had a grey bird like beak on his upper jaw, and wings on his arms that were folded.

Then it finally hit you, the anthro heading towards was a wyvern but not just a wyvern It was indeed the Nargacuga.

You couldn't believe it, Nargacuga was one of your favorite monster's Frome the video game monster hunter.

But what surprised you the most was the fact that he was over 200 feet tall.

His rumbling feet was making the ground shake with every step he made.

...THOOM...thoom...thoom...

You couldn’t move as you’re body was frozen in fear, but you soon realized that it was already to late as nargacuga already had one giant foot right above you.

Time seemed to stand still for a moment as you can see and observe every detail of the foot's underside, it looked firm/calloused, but still looked strangely soft with small wrinkles.

As time returned to normal, narga's foot slowly continuing downward's towards the bushes you were hiding in.

You screemed the shut your eyes awaiting your impending doom. That's when suddenly you hear a loud thounderous...THOOM, then a gust of wind that was so strong it blew you out of the bushes and landed a few feet away.

You opened your eyes suprised you were still alive, then looked up at Nargacuga who continued to walk passed you like nothing happend. You gasp for breath as you were lucky you didn’t end up crushed.

Nargacuga casually continued walking foward unaware that he almost crushed a tiny human underfoot.

You picked yourself up still a little shakend, you turned to Looked up at narga's backside. You saw his tail swishing from side to side and below his tail was his well sculpt bubble butt.

You couldn't help but blush a little as you stare at those perfectly round cheeks of his "damn he's thick" you blurted out.

You make a choice to follow after nargacuga or you can stay and observe the other monster's.

you chose?
111331.title: Nargacuga

1113311.content:
You were to fascinated with the nargacuga you decided fallow after him, you picked yourself up and ran after the nargacuga who since disappeared into the forest. But that wasn’t a problem, all you have to do is fellow his giant footprints that he left leading into the forest.

After fellowing the footprints for at least an hour through the forest, it led to a more secluded part of the island. You finally managed to catch up to nargacuga and saw that he was?
1113311.title: Follow Nargacuga

11133111.content:
As you were catching up with nargacuga, you soon discovered a large cave big enough to be used as a shelter or home for these giant creatures. As you come closer to the huge cave you could here the distant snoring coming from inside, you carefully sneak inside.

As you walk deeper in the cave the snoring seemed to get a little louder witch means nargacuga must be close, you continued on and finally found what you were looking for.

Nargacuga was lying on his stomach his legs out stretched, his head resting on his folded arms, he appears to be in deep sleep as you walk up to him. The first thing you come in contact with was his feet, you walk up to one of his feet and suddenly a slight cheesy aroma assaults your nostrils.

The scent wasn’t as bad as you thought, it was actually quite pleasant, as you Examine the dark grey leathery humanoid foot. The foot only had four toe's and each toe had sharp claws, it was covered in dirt and calluses and a debri of rock's and broken wood that got stuck to the underside of his foot while he was walking. but it still appeared strangely soft and glistening with little sweat.

You nervously reached a hand out and pressed a hand into the ball of the foot beneath the toes, your hand Sinked into the soft flesh it felt like a pillow it was literally that soft.

You placed both hands on the ball of the foot and pressed down into the soft flesh, squeezing it, and rubbing it, the feeling was incredible. Your hands were covered in dirt and sweat as you did this, the foot started to move and with. You quickly step back from the foot, as you saw the clawed toes wiggle slightly and herd nargacuga let out a low chuckle.

He seemed to be enjoying the little massage you were giving him, this made you smile. But should I continue with his feet or should explore the rest of his body?
11133111.title: Asleep in a cave

choices: He see's that your a human and talk's to you
He see's a annoying "pest" and swat's at you
111331112.content:
You decide to explore his body a little more, as you walk to the right side of his body passed his feet and continue pass his legs.

As you get to his hips, you stopped for minute and gaze at his well sculpted bubble butt. You always admired his cute butt when you first saw them bouncing and jiggling while nargacuga was walking away.

You decided to climb his hips by grabbed a piece of his furry flesh and hoist yourself up, as you climbed the fleshy wall of the giant anthro wyvern you hear him start chuckling again as your little movement’s were tickling him.

As you made it to the top of nargacuga’s right butt cheek, you stand there and feel your feet sink into the soft flesh, telling you exackly that he still has some fat stored in his butt. You get down on to your hands and knees and started rubbing, and squeezing the furry flesh, it felt incredible, the flesh was so soft and squishy. As you did this you hear nargacuga humming in pleasure, he was definitely enjoying this.

After minutes of massaging, you stopped and lay back into soft flesh exhausted, it felt like you were laying on a very soft fluffy pillow. As you lay there for minutes, the whole fleshy surface you were laying on started to move “what...the!” was the only thing you uttered out as you sat up.

Narga’s tail lifted casting a large shadow over you and started to wagged slowly, then you hear him let out a yawn while stretching His limbs, you suddenly realize that nargacuga was waking up.

Nargacuga the 200 feet tall giant anthro Wyvern on the other hand, was just waking up from his slumber he yawned and stretched his limbs, he slowly opened his gold yellow cat eyes. Nargacuga loved taking short naps it was like his daily routine sometimes, but that’s when he suddenly felt something on his rump, “...Huh?...” still a little groggy he turned his head back to see what was on his rump.

You were sitting there frozen in fear as you saw nargacuga turn his head to look at you.

Nargacuga blink's his eye's a few time's, and see's that you are a ?.
111331112.title: Explore his body

choices: In the Middle of the night
1113311121.content:
As Nargacuga blinked his eye's a little more to see more clearly, he saw that the tiny creature on his rump was indeed a human. He spoke "we'll look what I have here" he said a little suprized "I wasn't inspecting any guest tonight, especially that guest so happen's to be a human.

You were dumbfounded, here you are on a island inhabited by giant monster's and happen to meat one that is friendly and inteiligent.

You were brought out of you're thought's as you notice nergacuga's hand reaching for you. You didn't react fast enough as the finger's the size of piller's raps around you and gently pluck's you off of his rump and place you on ground in front of his face, so that he can see you better.

Then he spoke "now that's better, now we can have proper conversation" he said with his head propped on his folded arms, "so little one, who are you, and were did you come Frome?".

You told narga that your boat got trapped in a storm and banged your head in the process, then waking up on the sure not knowing where you were.

Then you told him how you saw all the giant anthros and him almost crushing you when he stepped on the bushes you were hiding in, and how you followed him to his cave.

After finishing your story.
Narga chuckled a little “you sure are very lucky Tyler, us kaiju don’t always watch where we plant are big feet, your lucky you weren’t crushed by mine” nerga chuckled as he closed his eyes fore a minute.

“Kaiju?” You thought.

“Excuse me narga but Exactly is a kaiju?” You ask him a question.

Narga opened his eyes and looked down at you, “I’m sorry what?”

You repeat the question.

“Oh...a kaiju is another word for giant monster... well...thats what you human's call us", "we personally don't like that term... actually we fined the term kinda offensive. narga answered.

"Then why did you just use that term just now if you all don't like to be called that?" you ask.

Narga rolled his gold cat eyes, "some of us...My self included...Actually embrace the term. But since I'm ok with you saying that it wouldn't
be wise to say that to the others, I mean you may call us Macro's, or Anthros if you like.

"Are the other (MACRO'S) as intelligent and friendly as you, you ask again.

Narga replied "i'll say half of us want to live peacefully, on the other half are territorial and get into conflict's, and have immense dislikement toward of human's.

This information has certainly frighten tyler, to find out that there's some kind of racism toward's human's withen these Macro's.
He sure was lucky he didn't run into a macro that hated human's or he would have been eatin or squished without even a second thought.

As you were shakend by that thought nerga spoke, "but don't worry nothing will happen to you as long as I'm here" Nerga said "I'll protect you".

"You will" Tyler said.

"Sure I will", nerga said "it's not my first time I got into a tussle with a another macro you know".

You took notice that nerga did have a few scars on him, but paid no intention to them.

“So about this island” nerga continued “it’s very big, very secluded, and it’s home to many macro's” said nerga.

"And how many macro's live on this island" you ask.

"Mmm...guesing by population possibly a few houndred" said nerga.

“Has there been other people/humans on this island before me” you ask again.

Nerga responded “there were many, most of the humans who wind up here are usually castaway's who wash up on the beach shore's like you, or crash here by sky in your flying machine’s or what you call them”.

“Plane’s?” you said.
"So that's what you call them" said nerga.

“Are there still humans on this island”

“I doubt it, humans who come here usually get eaten or stomped on, some even tried to swim off the island but they get attacked by the sea Macro's".

“Are you telling me there’s no way off of this Isl-“...you got erupted when narga yawned.

Narga yawned and stretched his limbs “I think it’s Time we get some sleep we have a big a day ahead of us”

You watched as narga's eye's started to slowly close and drift to sleep.

You wanted to go to sleep to, but you can’t sleep on the cold hard dirt ground, you looked at narga and dawn at his rump, his rump was soft and warm when you first Accoutered them, there’ll make a perfect bed.

“Hey narga” you shout a little.

Narga opened his eyes “...huh?” He turned his head to look at you with sleepy eyes.

“Can I please sleep on your...well?...backside?

Narga was silent for a moment then spoke “you want to sleep on my butt?” Narga said a little confused “why would you wan-?...know what I’m to tired to care...go ahead knock yourself out, narga said as laid his head back down and went to sleep.

You were overjoyed when narga said yes, you quickly ran over to narga’s hip and climbed to the top and lay down on the soft, warm, furry, rump of narga and fall asleep.

You wake in the morning or during the middle of the night.
1113311121.title: The two of you talk

11133112.content:
After hiking through the jungle forest for at least an hour you finally cought up with nargacuga, he was sitting on the ledge of a cliff that was...at your height a fall from that cliff would have broken your legs or killed you on spot.

But for Nargacuga it surved nothing more then a seat.

You kept yourself hidden behide a jungle tree as you watched Nargacuga, he seemed quite relaxed as he sat there shifting his tail a few time's, he has a good view of the ocean.

As the sun started to set, you saw Nargacuga lean back a little his arms behind for support then you see him spread his legs.

For short while the sky darkens, you see Narga slowly place his right arm between his legs and then you hear him start purring.

You smiled looks like Narga is having his little...(Me time moment)...you kinda felt like a perve watching him like this, but you just couldn't help it.

After a couple minutes narga's purring start turning into moan's and grunt's and his arm was moving a little fast, you now know Narga was straight up masturbating.

You blushed as you watched Narga jerk himself when you suddenly felt something on your foot, you looked down and saw a green snake.

You yelpt and kick the snake of you, but quickly shut your mouth and looked at Narga who suddenly stopped jerking his rod then saw one of his ear's twitch and turn.

You stay as silent as you can hoping Narga didn't hear you.

Did Narga hear you?

15211.content: You stared in shock, as the giant monster appeared from the forest, it looked like some kind of feline a panther maybe?, Accept for the fact it had black scales, dark bluish fur, wings on it's arms, red eyes, pointy ears, a tail and a beak. You recognize the monster as the "Nargacuga" a wyvern from one of your favorite the video games "Monster hunter", as you examine him more, he looked slightly more humanoid his body shape was slim a little athletic, between his legs was his sheath and balls, the 200 foot tall giant Narga started to look around and sniff the air as you stayed hidden. As you watched him for at least a minute, you saw the giant Narga turn the other direction and start walking away, as he did so you saw the view of his tail swaying from side to side as he walked, but what got most of your attention was his impressively large rear. You couldn't help but blush as you watch his glutes jiggle with each step he took as he walked further away, "damn he's thicc" you blurted out, you thought about following him, but was it a good idea to chase after a giant beast like that?. there's was no telling what the Nargacuga could of done to you if he spotted you, you could stay and explore the rest of the island or you could follow after the Nargacuga, after a little time of thought you decide.

info.brief_description: A man washes ashore on a uncharted island populated by giant anthro's
info.description:
A young Man named Tyler, finds himself on a island that is populated by giant anthro's. Can Tyler get off the island alive or will he fall victim to the island’s giant inhabitants.

Include
---------------------------
Vore
OV
AV
CV
Butt crush
Stompage
Feet
M/f, M/m, F/f,
Digestion
-----------------------------
don't allow
No farting
or anything to gross.
No bad grammer.
No short chapters.
No muscle growth.
No herms.
No inflation
No Giant human's
No body swap
No weight gain
-----------------------------
Note. Tyler is a young man in his twenties, who a bit survival skills to help him survive the island.

The anthro's can be from various species like for a example. Mythical, aquatic, dinosaur's, Raptile's, felins, canine's, avian's, you name it. They can also be from video games, or a TV series if you like.

The anthro's are giant, they have to be at least between100 to 300 feet tall.

Most of the anthro's are hostile towards humans, but there are some that are friendly.

The anthro's can be any body shape, muscular, skinny, fat, feminine.

The anthro's can be male or female.

The mane protagonist can die but not to early.

Thats it, I will offer anyone 300 gps if you add or review my item.

This is my first story think you.
